name: Little Johnka mainsail — Ceccarelli CYD27
source: Ceccarelli CYD27 sail plan (uploads/CYD27 Sail Plans). Some values OCR'd from a low-res scan — confirm MGM and spreader lengths against the source CAD.
_note: stations = ORC-style mainsail girths; chord_mm = real cross-section (chord) length at that height; height_frac = height up the luff as a fraction of P (estimated — refine from the CAD). The draft stripes sit at these stations, so each is a known-length ruler for perspective calibration.
_polar_note: LJ ORC polar (2020 cert, GPH 660.2) — mirrors data/boats.json (id lj). Used to auto-judge 'fast' (boatspeed vs polar target %) so the fast-shape library fills itself.
